summary: Re-enable iCloud sync with Developer ID provisioning and Production CloudKit schema.

introduced: iCloud CloudKit sync for accounts, notes, clipboard, and settings across Macs on the same Apple ID
Developer ID provisioning profile embedded at sign time for Gatekeeper-compatible iCloud entitlements
CloudKit Development schema file and seed script for future container setup
fixed: Fix iCloud entitlements using CloudKit service array instead of wildcard value
Fix SwiftData models for CloudKit by adding property defaults and removing unique constraints on synced records
Fix CloudKit bootstrap falling back to local storage when iCloud is unavailable
changed: Release builds ship with full iCloud entitlements matched to team Q3TXW887NM provisioning profile
